# Support Policy

Thank you for using and contributing to **SariSari**! We want to ensure you have the best experience managing your store's inventory, sales, and suki loans (utang).

Please refer to the guidelines below to find the best channel for your questions, support requests, or bug reports.

---

## 🛠️ How to Get Help

### 1. Check the Documentation

Before opening an issue or seeking support, please consult the available documentation files in the repository:

- [README.md](file:///C:/Users/giomj/OneDrive/Desktop/sarisari/README.md) — Setup instructions, architecture overview, and running the project locally.
- [PRODUCT.md](file:///C:/Users/giomj/OneDrive/Desktop/sarisari/PRODUCT.md) — Product purpose, brand personality, design principles, and user definitions.
- [AGENTS.md](file:///C:/Users/giomj/OneDrive/Desktop/sarisari/AGENTS.md) — Technical conventions, non-negotiable rules, stack cheatsheet, and directory layout.
- [DESIGN.md](file:///C:/Users/giomj/OneDrive/Desktop/sarisari/DESIGN.md) — Design tokens, visual guide, mascot info (Sari/Garapon), and typography.

### 2. GitHub Discussions

For general questions, design ideas, or setup troubleshooting, please use the **GitHub Discussions** tab on the repository (if enabled). This helps keep our GitHub Issues focused on actionable bug fixes and feature development.

### 3. GitHub Issues

If you encounter a specific bug, error, or wish to suggest a feature enhancement:

- **Bugs**: First check the existing issues to see if it has already been reported. If not, open a new issue using our **Bug Report** template.
- **Features/Enhancements**: Open a new issue using our **Feature Request** or **Enhancement** templates.

### 4. Direct Support

If you have a inquiry that cannot be handled publicly on GitHub, or need direct assistance, you can contact the maintainer:

- **Email**: [giomjds@gmail.com](mailto:giomjds@gmail.com)

---

## 🔒 Security Vulnerabilities

If you suspect or find a security vulnerability, **do not open a public issue**. Please report it privately by following our [Security Policy](file:///C:/Users/giomj/OneDrive/Desktop/sarisari/.github/SECURITY.md) (sending an email detailing the findings to [giomjds@gmail.com](mailto:giomjds@gmail.com)).

---

## 🇵🇭 Welcoming Community (Taglish Friendly)

Since SariSari is built specifically for Filipino store owners and local contexts, we welcome issues, feedback, and discussions in **English, Tagalog, or Taglish**. Do not hesitate to express your issues or feedback in whichever language is easiest for you!
